title: Local Langlands after Fargues–Scholze — Proof DAG
description: The downstream program of the Fargues–Scholze geometrization of the local Langlands correspondence: testing, refining, and extending the FS construction. FS (2102.13459) builds a candidate local Langlands map for any reductive group over a $p$-adic field via sheaves on $\mathrm{Bun}_G$ and excursion operators, with the dual group produced from geometric Satake. The papers here take that construction as input — verifying it agrees with the classical correspondence (Hamann, Gan–Takeda compatibility), refining the internal structure of its $L$-packets via endoscopy (Kazhdan–Varshavsky), and probing the stronger categorical conjecture (Fu, depth-zero supercuspidals). Cross-links: the root node 2102.13459 is SHARED with the perfectoid-spaces DAG — that overlap is the cross-DAG link (perfectoid $p$-adic geometry $\to$ étale cohomology of diamonds $\to$ geometrization of local Langlands). See related_dags.

2102.13459.title: Geometrization of the local Langlands correspondence
2102.13459.role: root / hub — constructs the candidate FS local Langlands map for any reductive $G/\mathbb{Q}_p$ via $D(\mathrm{Bun}_G)$ and excursion operators (thm:I.10.1), with the Langlands dual group built from geometric Satake on the $B_{\mathrm{dR}}^+$-affine Grassmannian (thm:I.6.3) and the moduli of $L$-parameters $Z^1(W_E,\widehat{G})$ (thm:I.8.1); SHARED node with the perfectoid-spaces DAG

2109.01210.title: Compatibility of the Fargues-Scholze and Gan-Takeda Local Langlands
2109.01210.role: verification — proves the FS correspondence agrees with the classical (Gan–Takeda) local Langlands for $\mathrm{GSp}_4$ and its inner form, the first nontrivial compatibility check pinning FS to known LLC

2503.00621.title: Endoscopic decomposition of elliptic Fargues-Scholze L-packets
2503.00621.role: refinement — decomposes elliptic FS $L$-packets along endoscopic data, giving internal structure (stable/endoscopic characters) to the packets the FS construction produces

2504.13869.title: On the categorical local Langlands conjectures for depth-zero regular supercuspidal representations
2504.13869.role: categorical probe — tests the stronger categorical form of the FS conjecture (the equivalence on $D(\mathrm{Bun}_G)$) for depth-zero regular supercuspidals, verifying predicted Hecke-eigensheaf structure

2505.10724.title: Categorical local Langlands and torsion classes of some Shimura varieties
2505.10724.role: categorical + application — a categorical decomposition of the FS category $D_{\mathrm{lis}}(\mathrm{Bun}_G)$ along $L$-parameters, construction of Hecke eigensheaves (a case of the Fargues conjecture), and computation of torsion classes in the cohomology of Shimura / Rapoport–Zink spaces

2501.07944.title: Geometrization of the local Langlands correspondence, motivically
2501.07944.role: extension — a motivic refinement of the FS construction (motivic $D(\mathrm{Bun}_G)$, motivic geometric Satake) proving the independence-of-$\ell$ conjecture (FS Conjecture I.9.5)

related_dags.perfectoid-spaces: Shares the root node 2102.13459 (Fargues–Scholze, Geometrization of local Langlands). In the perfectoid DAG that paper is the application terminus — it imports étale cohomology of diamonds (1709.07343), the Fargues–Fontaine / FF-classification machinery, and $p$-adic Hodge inputs (1111.4914, 1301.0792, 1602.03148). In this DAG it is the ROOT: the construction whose outputs the downstream papers verify, refine, and extend. The shared node is the cross-DAG handoff from $p$-adic geometry into the Langlands program.

GanTakeda:GSp4.title: The local Langlands conjecture for GSp(4)
GanTakeda:GSp4.role: foundational — the classical LLC for $\mathrm{GSp}_4$ that Hamann checks the FS correspondence against

VLafforgue:Global.title: Chtoucas pour les groupes réductifs et paramétrisation de Langlands globale
VLafforgue:Global.role: foundational — the excursion-operator method for constructing Langlands parameters, the global function-field template FS adapt to the local $p$-adic setting

Fargues:Conjecture.title: Geometrization of the local Langlands correspondence: an overview / Fargues' conjecture
Fargues:Conjecture.role: foundational — the original conjecture (Hecke eigensheaves on $\mathrm{Bun}_G$) that the categorical form tested by Fu makes precise

Mieda:Lefschetz.title: Lefschetz trace formula and $\ell$-adic cohomology of Rapoport–Zink towers
Mieda:Lefschetz.role: foundational — cohomology-of-RZ-spaces realizations of LLC used in compatibility/endoscopy arguments

Kaletha:RegularSupercuspidal.title: Regular supercuspidal representations
Kaletha:RegularSupercuspidal.role: foundational — the regular-supercuspidal $L$-packet construction Fu's depth-zero categorical check is matched against
